findings.evidence: `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Polynomial/CardBoundedCoeff.lean:70` proves `{f : ℤ[X] | f.natDegree ≤ d ∧ ∀ i, |f.coeff i| ≤ (B : ℤ)}.ncard ≤ (2 * B + 1) ^ (d + 1)`, and `code/TauCeti/NumberTheory/EffectiveBounds/PolynomialCount.lean:88` discharges the new theorem by `exact TauCeti.Polynomial.ncard_natDegree_le_abs_intCoeff_le D C` after rewriting `intPolynomialBox`.
findings.fix: Use `TauCeti.Polynomial.ncard_natDegree_le_abs_intCoeff_le` directly, or keep only a notation/definition wrapper if the roadmap needs the boxed predicate.
findings.issue: `card_intPolynomial_degree_height_le` duplicates the existing integer bounded-degree/bounded-coefficient count.

summary: The main count added by this PR is already present in TauCeti and the new theorem simply rewrites to that existing result.
